content:
This Month's Goals
(What are the most important things I can do this month to get closer to my 1-year goals?)


Answer: A few of the most important things I can do this month to get closer to my 1 year goals is to seek and obtain employment. To stick it out and stay under 1 roof and fix things in small doses. To have a flow and to argue less. To be kind. To be the bigger person. And set things in motion again. To figure all the things causing noise in my head, to bring some order within my mind, so I can start doing things I want to do, and work towards my goals.

Week 1: The Seeker's Departure
Weekly Goals:
  • Goal 1: To apply to a lot of job openings nearby
  • Goal 2: To go in for interviews prepared and successfully gain employment
  • Goal 3: To make things work with Kevin so I can have a little more inner peace, and stability under the roof I live. To understand what allows for things to go in a good direction for us and what doesn’t. To do one activity with Kevin that is good for the both of us.
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 4 (chunk 4/29)
